<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Framework\MockObject; use function call_user_func_array; use function func_get_args; use PHPUnit\Framework\MockObject\Builder\InvocationMocker; use PHPUnit\Framework\MockObject\Rule\AnyInvokedCount; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit * * @internal This trait is not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ trait Method { abstract public function __phpunit_getInvocationHandler(): InvocationHandler; public function method(): InvocationMocker { $expects = $this->__phpunit_getInvocationHandler()->expects(new AnyInvokedCount); return call_user_func_array( [$expects, 'method'], func_get_args(), ); } }
